creator: josh.carroll@gmail.com
text:
I'm taking a look at this, but yesterday I had a hard drive snafu, and
unfortunately the work (albeit minimal) was lost for this.

One thing of note:

- on 7.0-RELEASE/i386, it attempts to build the vnc module, but fails.
- on 7.0-RELEASE/amd64, as reported, it simply does not even attempt to build it

I am planning on trying the build this on 6.3 or 6-STABLE as well to
see if the build failure on the i386 arch is related to 7 or not.

I need to get things re-setup/re-built and logged so I can go through
and compare the logs.

Thanks,
Josh
